items.reason: Covers LogSampler rate normalization, threshold sampling, event distribution, fatal/disabled paths, and concurrent config reads.
Covers proto/flag config updates, invalid config retention, derivation, disabled folding, and request decision creation.
Covers access sampling OR rules, REQUEST_OUT bypass, sampled marker formatting, and sampled-out access guard behavior.
Covers LOG/PLOG/VLOG macro evaluation skipping, diagnostic supplement sampling, background bypass, and fatal/check preservation.
Covers new typed AccessRecorder facades, deferred providers, sampled-out skips, key lifetime cases, and request_out behavior.
Updates existing log-message tests to assert sampler-driven stream expression evaluation and propagated reject behavior.
Covers ZMQ MetaPb sample-state propagation for disabled, full-rate, zero-rate, admit/reject, and receiver-local decisions.
Adds focused performance guardrails for 4000 QPS request sampling, pass-through overhead, reject fast path, and access sampled-out field laziness.
The cross-process consistency test only runs client operations; it does not assert propagated sample decisions or client/worker log consistency.
